title: About cgroup v2 — Using cgroup v2
text:
The recommended way to use cgroup v2 is to use a Linux distribution that
enables and uses cgroup v2 by default.
To check if your distribution uses cgroup v2, refer to
Identify cgroup version on Linux nodes
.

cgroup v2 has the following requirements:
OS distribution enables cgroup v2
Linux Kernel version is 5.8 or later
Container runtime supports cgroup v2. For example:
containerd
v1.4 and later
cri-o
v1.20 and later
The kubelet and the container runtime are configured to use the
systemd cgroup driver
containerd
v1.4 and later
cri-o
v1.20 and later
